abstract: This is a programmatic SEO system that generated 13,000+ useful, structured, and functional web pages in under 3 hours, resulting in a +466% (5.7x) increase in weekly organic traffic—from 971 to 5,500 clicks—in 60 days. The system does not rely on thin AI content, city-name swaps, or template spam. Instead, it uses structured AI generation with strict JSON schemas, niche-specific context, and purpose-built React components to produce pages that are usable, indexable, and valuable even if search

source_article.title: How I built 13,000+ pages in 3 hours and grew SEO traffic +466% in 60 days
source_article.author: @ManiClones
